binary_checks: Did the answer identify prioritization/enforcement weakness as the main bottleneck rather than just 'bureaucracy' in general?
Did the answer name at least one real slow variable such as enforcement capacity, member-state coordination, or indicator architecture?
Did the top intervention improve high-impact targeting or enforcement directly?
Did the answer avoid distractors such as more strategy rhetoric or generic information campaigns?
Did the answer include at least one useful early-warning signal?

slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.1: One real slow variable or mixed with symptoms
slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.2: Multiple real slow variables, clearly separated from symptoms

distractor_resistance_0_to_2.2: Stays focused on the real constraint
